poll.question: Tomorrow: Should Marcus and Jade be openly tender, or move gently through Ryan's adjusting?

options.label: Openly tender
options.desc: Their love is real; watching it is how Ryan learns he's still held.

options.label: Move gently
options.desc: Tender care first; Ryan's trust settles when nothing's rushed.

options.label: Three together
options.desc: All affection flows between all three—no pairing off, all secure.

in_play.label: Tell them
in_play.desc: Name the choice aloud. Risk the peace for words.
